prompt: For a protein engineering research program, optimize the half-life at 37°C of Enterotoxin type B (SEB) (bacterial superantigen toxin (select agent)) from Staphylococcus aureus. detail a computational workflow for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
